placefailure-vsdune:notbasinsand: Must be placed on the open desert sand.
blockdesc-dewdrop: A bead of moisture clinging to a plant at first light. Right-click to drink.
itemdesc-bloodextractor: A handheld device that extracts a small amount of water from a fallen enemy's body. Right-click a dead enemy to use; the body desiccates and is consumed.
deadcreature-eaten-smuggler-soldier: Killed by a smuggler. The Baron looks the other way; the smugglers don't.
deadcreature-eaten-smuggler-officer: Killed by a smuggler officer. House-blind, House-paid.
deadcreature-eaten-smuggler-rifleman: Killed by a smuggler rifleman. The shot came from a friendly direction.
itemdesc-ornithopter-controlkey: Slot into a thopter's control panel. Without one, the cockpit is just a chair.
deadcreature-eaten-fremen-warrior-axe: Killed by a Fremen warrior. Their crysknife found you before the sand did.
deadcreature-eaten-fremen-warrior-knife: Killed by a Fremen warrior. A quick, quiet death.
deadcreature-eaten-fremen-warrior-spear: Killed by a Fremen warrior. The spear came out of the dune light.
deadcreature-eaten-fremen-archer: Killed by a Fremen archer. They sing as they hunt.
deadcreature-eaten-harkonnen-soldier: Killed by a Harkonnen soldier. The Baron's reach extends to Arrakis.
deadcreature-eaten-harkonnen-officer: Killed by a Harkonnen officer. House sigils mean nothing in the sand.
deadcreature-eaten-harkonnen-rifleman: Killed by a Harkonnen rifleman. The shot rang out, then nothing.
deadcreature-eaten-scavenger-thug: Killed by a scavenger. Crude, but it did the job.
deadcreature-eaten-scavenger-spearman: Killed by a scavenger. The spice trade owes them now.
deadcreature-eaten-scavenger-sniper: Killed by a scavenger. You never heard the shot.
blockdesc-thopterwreck: Twisted remains of an ornithopter. Break it down with a copper-tier pickaxe to scrap the metal.
itemdesc-spice-plastic: Sheet of polymer smelted from spice and calcined flint. The Fremen craft their gear from this; the Houses pretend not to notice.
itemdesc-sandcompactor: Mechanical hand-compactor. Digs sand fast, otherwise a humble shovel.
itemdesc-scrap: Twisted alloy torn from a thopter wreck. Smelts to duraluminum at a heavy loss - nine scrap per ingot.
itemdesc-ingot-duraluminum: Light, strong alloy salvaged from offworld craft. The Houses don't share the formula.
itemdesc-wormtooth: A crystalline tooth shed by Shai-Hulud. The Fremen carve their crysknives from these.
itemdesc-crysknife: Sacred Fremen blade carved from a sandworm's tooth. Once drawn, tradition demands it draw blood.
gamedesc-fremen: Desert-born of Arrakis. You walk the sand as the worms do, with rhythm that draws none. Where outsiders are hunted, you pass.
